events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: the as-found/as-left cal sheet shows a near-zero error at the 0% point but progressively larger deviation toward the upper range value — the signature of a **span (gain) error**, not a zero shift, exceeding the ISA/site QC tolerance. Recommended fix is a span-then-zero re-adjustment with full 5-point re-verification, and sensor/electronics replacement if adjustment can't hold tolerance.
